content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "NIFTY -1.0% and VIX +8% to 18.20 signal risk-off, but Pharma (+0.58%) and IT (+0.25%) are holding as defensive/INR-hedge. Book is well-positioned with COFORGE +9.3% as standout. Focus on protecting gains (trail SLs) and selective adds in defensive sectors; avoid stacking new cyclicals into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating in tight range. SL 121 is 2% below CMP 123.53 — appropriate. Defensive hedge against the high-VIX tape. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico +2.5%, at 52w high 843. SL already at 828 (breakeven+1%). Gap to CMP 840 = 1.5%, just above the 1% trail floor. Leave SL as-is — no-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.3% at 1372.50. Stored SL 1357.20 sits 1.1% below CMP — within the 1% trail-gap discipline floor. No-op MODIFY; respect Rule 14 anti-churn. HOLD existing SL; let blockbuster Q4 thesis run toward 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA CMP 1630.60, stored SL 1630 — SL flush with CMP is self-stopout risk (Rule violation if I trail tighter). The right action is EXIT or accept the SL will trip on any down-tick. Position is +0.6%, marginal. Given DRREDDY/CIPLA binary tomorrow and Wockhardt's rich valuation post-12% rally, I will EXIT to lock the small gain rather than let SL trip on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior HOLD. SL 1630 is flush with CMP 1630.60 (0.04% gap) — guaranteed stopout on the next downtick. Position is essentially already stopped; better to take the +0.6% / +₹276 cleanly than absorb slippage on SL fire. Pharma binary tomorrow (DRREDDY/CIPLA) adds risk to a stretched +12%-in-4-sessions chart. Clean exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.3%, SL 2760 is 1.3% below CMP 2795.70 — within trail discipline. Q4 PAT +47%, refrigerant capex ramped to ₹2,300cr. Hold for target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5%, SL 8950 is 1.2% below CMP 9053. Within trail floor. Margin compression a watch-item but order book strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.7%, SL 10440 is 1.3% below CMP 10579.50. Within trail floor. Buyback at ₹12,000 (record date May 29) provides hard floor. Hold for target 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.5%, SL 468 is 2.4% below CMP 479.65. Within trail floor. Q4 PAT +15%, guidance upgraded. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1250.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.5%, SL 1250 is 1.7% below CMP 1271.50 — within trail floor. SL at breakeven+2% locks in the gain. No-op vs stored values; emit HOLD effectively. Keep SL as-is; valuation stretched at 70x P/E so don't trail tighter."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM -2.1%, SL 1198 is 2.0% below CMP 1222.30. Within trail floor. Q4 PAT +21.5%, India volume +16%, Sampan +69%. Thesis intact, hold to SL or target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER +0.5%, SL 850 is 1.9% below CMP 866.70. Within trail floor. Order book +61% YoY, Q4 PAT +32%. Hold for target 920."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 6,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 8095.00,
      "stop_loss": 7850.00,
      "target": 8500.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Healthcare outperformer, +3.34% to 52w high on 1.1x volume — clean technical breakout above 8000. Industry earnings growth 21%, APOLLO at 37.5%. Q4 results May 20 (9 days away — OUTSIDE the 3-session binary window of Rule 11, so admissible as a normal swing). Size ~5% of capital (₹48,570), SL -3% (245 risk × 6 = ₹1,470 = 0.15% of portfolio — well within 0.5% per-name budget). Target 8500 = +5%, R:R = 405/245 = 1.65. Defensive healthcare expression of the pharma/healthcare strength theme, less binary than DRREDDY/CIPLA tomorrow. Exit plan: if 8500 not hit in 7 days OR pre-May-20 results, reassess; tighten SL to breakeven if +3%."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Earnings tomorrow (May 12) — binary within 1 session. Per Rule 11, event-trade needs min conf 0.70 and Brazil ANVISA rejection + 5.7% monthly underperformance argues bearish setup, not bullish. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BIOCON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "CEO resignation March 31 = governance/leadership transition overhang. P/E 60+. Reported PAT down 56.8% YoY (even if exceptional-driven, headline risk persists). Per Rule 13, skip on governance overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w low May 8, FY27 guidance weak (1-4%), bearish modifier -0.12 in research. Catching a falling knife in a sector-disruption narrative — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Already held in book at ₹1248 entry (currently -2.1%). Not adding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121 = -2% from CMP, appropriate for defensive ETF in high-VIX tape."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 828 at breakeven+1%, 1.5% below CMP — within trail discipline. No tighten needed."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1357.20 sits 1.1% below CMP 1372.50 — at the trail-gap floor. Tighter would be self-stopout. +9.3% locked in via current SL."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL flush with CMP = guaranteed stopout. Take the small +₹276 gain cleanly ahead of pharma binary tomorrow."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 2760 = 1.3% below CMP, within trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 8950 = 1.2% below CMP, within trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor ₹12,000 (record May 29). SL 10440 = 1.3% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 468 = 2.4% below CMP. Q4 in line, FY27 guidance raised."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1250 at breakeven+2%, 1.7% below CMP. Locked-in gain with room for normal noise."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +21.5%, India vol +16%). SL 1198 = 2% below CMP, respect Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Order book +61% YoY. SL 850 = 1.9% below CMP."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DRREDDY/CIPLA — wait for tomorrow's print. MCX, BIOCON, BAJAJ-AUTO add-on — watch for buyback record-date setup. HFCL pending OPEN order from prior session — that's 7614 minutes old (multi-day stale), should cancel on next cycle if still working; market context has shifted. SUNPHARMA, INFY, PERSISTENT — monitor IT/Pharma defensive rotation; would consider on a pullback rather than chase strength on a -1% NIFTY day.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 45% — below soft 80% target. Adding APOLLOHOSP brings deployment to ~50%. High-VIX tape (18.20, +8%) plus 11 existing positions argues for selective adds, not stacking. Per Rule 18: walked through every BULLISH watchlist candidate explicitly — DRREDDY/CIPLA rejected on Rule 11 binary, BIOCON on Rule 13 governance, HCLTECH on bearish modifier, TATACONSUM already held, MCX/IDEA/MRPL extended/below-threshold. APOLLOHOSP is the cleanest defensive admit. Cumulative experiment P&L +₹3,914 (+0.39%), 5-day rolling profit factor 0.9x — needs improvement; the trail-SL discipline overhaul is the right structural fix. WOCKPHARMA exit is a Rule 17/state-arithmetic call: SL was within 0.04% of CMP, so the SL was effectively already at CMP — taking the gain on my terms is preferable to slippage on the fire."
}
